name: SCAR-20 | 心脏打击
descriptionEn: The SCAR-20 is a semi-automatic sniper rifle that trades a high rate of fire and powerful long-distance damage for sluggish movement speed and big price tag. It has been heat wrapped with vinyl pre-printed in a modern orange and blue design. beep. beep. beeeeeeeeeeeep...
descriptionZh: SCAR-20 是一把以迟缓的移动速度和高昂的价格为代价，换取高射速及强大的远距离杀伤力的半自动狙击步枪。 这把武器通过乙烯预印的工艺对表面加热，并且印上了现代风格的橙色和蓝色的设计图案。 哔哔，哔哔，哔哔哔哔哔哔哔哔…
